title: Beware of Bachelors
writer: Darryl F. Zanuck, Robert Lord, Joseph Jackson
actors: Audrey Ferris, William Collier Jr., Tom Ricketts
plot: A young couple, Ed (Willain Collier Jr.) and May (Audrey Ferris) have to stay married for a year in order to receive a large monetary windfall from a kindly relative. If they don't the money goes to a cousin, Claude de Brie (Georg...
